scenarioName: Block pull request when report truth validation fails

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Block pull request when report truth validation fails
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The CI report truth workflow should execute all specified gates, and if any gate fails, the pull request should be blocked.
steps.observedResult: The report.md from a passing local test suite indicates that the gates can run successfully. There is no evidence to confirm that a pull request would be blocked if any of these gates were to fail.
